metadata.composer: 'More Love to Thee' William Howard Doane, 1870 William Howard Doane, 1870, alt

c_lines: Music: 'More Love to Thee' William Howard Doane, 1870.  Setting: William Howard Doane, 1870, alt.
copyright: public domain.  This score is a part of the Open Hymnal Project, 2012 Revision.

1.raw_text: More love to Thee, O Christ; More love to Thee; Hear Thou the pray'r I make On bended knee; This is my earnest plea, More love, O Christ, to Thee, More love to Thee; More love to Thee.

2.raw_text: Once earthly joy I craved, Sought peace and rest; Now thee alone I seek, Give what is best; This all my pray'r shall be, More love, O Christ, to Thee, More love to Thee; More love to Thee.

3.raw_text: Then shall my latest breath, Whisper Thy praise, This be the parting cry My heart shall raise; This still its pray'r shall be, More love, O Christ, to Thee, More love to Thee; More love to Thee.
